ddls:
CREATE TABLE "load_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load test */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the load test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the load test */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the load test */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the load test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was conducted (e.g., staging, production) */,
  "test_script" TEXT /* Script or configuration used for the load test */,
  "test_tool" TEXT /* Load testing tool or framework used */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., scheduled, running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the load test the metric belongs to */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time at which the metric was recorded */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput (requests per second) at the given time */,
  "avg_latency" REAL /* Average latency at the given time */,
  "min_latency" REAL /* Minimum latency at the given time */,
  "25th_latency" REAL /* 25th percentile latency at the given time */,
  "median_latency" REAL /* Median latency at the given time */,
  "75th_latency" REAL /* 75th percentile latency at the given time */,
  "90th_latency" REAL /* 90th percentile latency at the given time */,
  "95th_latency" REAL /* 95th percentile latency at the given time */,
  "99th_latency" REAL /* 99th percentile latency at the given time */,
  "max_latency" REAL /* Maximum latency at the given time */,
  "transaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction or API endpoint being tested */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate at the given time */,
  "concurrent_users" INTEGER /* Number of concurrent users at the given time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES load_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, QA engineer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the load test the result belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the test */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time at which the test was run */,
  "test_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the test, such as notes or comments */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was conducted (e.g., staging, production) */,
  "test_script" TEXT /* Script or configuration used for the test */,
  "test_tool" TEXT /* Load testing tool or framework used */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test (in seconds) */,
  "test_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test */,
  "test_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES load_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test scenario */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the load test the scenario belongs to */,
  "num_users" INTEGER /* Number of users simulated in the scenario */,
  "request_rate" INTEGER /* Request rate (requests per second) in the scenario */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the scenario (in seconds) */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the test scenario */,
  "scenario_description" TEXT /* Description of the test scenario */,
  "scenario_type" TEXT /* Type of the test scenario (e.g., stress test, load test) */,
  "test_script" TEXT /* Script or configuration used for the scenario */,
  "test_tool" TEXT /* Load testing tool or framework used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scenarios_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES load_tests ("test_id")
)
